setup_instructions: Option A Formspree: create a Formspree form, set ATLASOPS_LEAD_ENDPOINT_TYPE=formspree and ATLASOPS_LEAD_ENDPOINT_URL to the form endpoint.
Option B Google Apps Script: deploy a doPost(e) web app that writes to a Sheet and sends a Gmail notification, then set ATLASOPS_LEAD_ENDPOINT_TYPE=google_apps_script and ATLASOPS_LEAD_ENDPOINT_URL.
Option C fallback: keep the public form in setup-required mode and use the PayPal/contact instructions until the endpoint exists.
privacy_rules: No passwords, API keys, payment cards, or private uploads in public forms.
UTM fields are campaign context only, not browser fingerprinting.
Lead data is local Atlas runtime data and is never committed to the public website repo.
